meta.title: Coach-Level Reg Park + Powerlifting Cut
meta.subtitle: 228 lb to 205 lb | 12-week strength-focused fat loss plan

setup.coach_notes: If weekly loss is below lower bound for 2 straight weeks, reduce calories by adjustment step. If above upper bound and strength drops, add calories/reduce cardio.

trainingPlan.progressionRule: Add 5 lb next exposure if all reps hit
trainingPlan.warmUpSets: 45% x5, 60% x3, 75% x2, then work sets
trainingPlan.notes: Log actual sets in Workout Log

progressionRules.situation: All 5x5 sets completed at target RPE
progressionRules.coachAction: Add 5 lb next time for squat/bench/row; add 10 lb deadlift only if bar speed is strong.
Repeat same weight next exposure. Do not add load.
Reduce next exposure by 5-10% and rebuild.
Reduce calories by Setup adjustment step or add 2,000 steps/day.
Add 100-150 calories or reduce cardio if performance is dropping.
Hold load, reduce accessories, and keep Zone 2 easy.
Deload week: use lighter load, keep movement quality high.
Test 3-5RM, not a true max, unless recovery is excellent.
